author: xryul
description: Reveal invisible Unicode characters and suspicious indentation in notes. - This plugin has not been manually reviewed by Obsidian staff.

manifest.author: xRyul
manifest.description: Reveal invisible Unicode characters and suspicious indentation in notes.
manifest.name: Gremlins

name: Gremlins

releases.author: xRyul
releases.description:
## List indentation

- Adds a dedicated, opt-in **List indentation** rule for malformed Markdown list indentation.
- Uses Obsidian's current **Indent visual width** when detecting and fixing list indentation.
- Rounds indentation to the nearest configured level, with ties rounded to the deeper level.
- Preserves the existing indentation style: spaces remain spaces, while tab-led mixed indentation keeps its tabs.
- Uses Obsidian's Markdown parser to avoid flagging list-like content inside code blocks and other non-list contexts.
- Supports unordered, ordered, and task list items in Source mode and Live Preview.

## Improvements

- Mixed-indentation width calculations now follow Obsidian's current indent visual width instead of assuming four columns.
- Adds regression coverage for list depths, configurable widths, parser context, fixes, settings, and tooltips.
releases.name: Gremlins 0.3.0

releases.author: xRyul
releases.description:
## Mixed indentation

- TAB + SPACE when pressing on Gremlin will become only a TAB. This is for cases where we have mixed indentations e.g. 1 bullet is more indented than other. Gremlin flags it, user clicks on Gremlin, indentation is back to be as the rest of indentations.
releases.name: Gremlins 0.2.4

releases.author: xRyul
releases.description:
## Em dash support

- Adds `U+2014` em dash (`—`) detection to the optional typographic punctuation rules.
- Replaces em dashes with ASCII hyphens (`-`) when click-to-fix is enabled.
releases.name: Gremlins 0.2.3

releases.author: xRyul
releases.description:
## Custom Gremlin gutter icon

- Replace the generic bug with an original Gremlin icon designed for 12–16 px gutters.
- Inherit error, warning, and info colours from the active Obsidian theme.
- Keep the icon visible and clickable with line numbers enabled or disabled.
- Refresh the README preview to showcase invisible Unicode, mixed indentation, optional typography, tooltips, and the new icon.
releases.name: Gremlins 0.2.2

releases.author: xRyul
releases.description:
## Gutter layout fix

- Keep the editor body aligned when Gremlins gutter icons are enabled.
- Keep Gremlin icons visible and clickable with line numbers enabled or disabled.
- Position icons in Obsidian's existing gutter spacing without changing the document width.
releases.name: Gremlins 0.2.1

releases.author: xRyul
releases.description:
## Click-to-fix gremlins

- Add an opt-in setting to fix every gremlin on a line by clicking its gutter icon.
- Normalize spacing and punctuation, remove flagged invisible controls, and convert mixed indentation to Markdown-safe spaces.
- Show a brief explosion animation when a gremlin is fixed.
- Add **Gremlins: Fix current line** for keyboard and touch workflows.
- Apply each line fix in one undoable editor transaction.
releases.name: Gremlins 0.2.0

releases.author: xRyul
releases.description:
## Initial release

- Highlight zero-width characters, bidirectional controls, non-breaking spaces, soft hyphens, and related Unicode gremlins.
- Detect leading indentation that mixes tabs and spaces.
- Show severity-coloured editor decorations and gutter icons.
- Display character names, Unicode code points, and severity on hover.
- Optionally highlight typographic punctuation.
- Inspect the gremlin at the cursor from the command palette.
releases.name: Gremlins 0.1.0
